This is for you if

You are not waiting
for permission to lead.

🪞
You downplay your achievements
Someone praises your work and you immediately redirect the credit, or say "it was nothing really." You know it is happening — you just can't seem to stop it.
🔒
You feel stuck at the same level
You have the experience and the drive, but the next opportunity keeps going to someone else. You are not sure whether it is your presence, your strategy, or something else entirely.
🌀
Imposter syndrome is loud
Even when things are going well, there is a persistent voice asking "what if they find out I don't really know what I'm doing?" You are exhausted from carrying it alone.
💸
1:1 coaching is out of reach
You know coaching would help. But a full 3-month program costs thousands of dollars — money you cannot justify right now. You need expert guidance at a price that makes sense.
⏱
You have no time to waste
You are balancing a full career, relationships and life. You need development that works around your schedule — not another commitment that burns you out before you begin.
🧭
You have lost your sense of direction
Somewhere between the demands of the job and the expectations of others, you have lost touch with what you actually want — and what kind of leader you are meant to become.
The Program

A full year of structured growth, built around your life.

Presence & Purpose is structured as 8 progressive modules across 12 months — each one building on the last, each unlocking at the right moment in your growth. You move at your own pace, on your own schedule, supported by a coaching bot available any time you need a thinking partner.

This is not passive content consumption. It is active, guided development — with deep reflection, coaching conversations and knowledge checks designed to help you apply every insight to your real leadership, right now.

What's Inside

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

📚
8 Self-Paced Modules
Rich learning content drawn from Kristen's in-person retreat workbook — structured, progressive and designed to be applied immediately to your real working life.
✦
Always-On Coaching Bot
Your personal thinking partner, available 24/7. Powered by the evidence-based GROW coaching model — guiding you through goals, obstacles, options and action steps any time you need it.
🧬
Strengths & Personality Assessments
Start your journey with the VIA Character Strengths Survey and the 16Personalities test — two world-class tools that give you a rich self-awareness foundation from day one.
✍️
Guided Reflection Exercises
Every module includes deep written reflection prompts — saved to your profile and woven throughout your experience — so your insights build on each other across the full year.
✅
Knowledge Checks
Reinforce your learning with reflective assessments at the end of each module — designed not to test you, but to help the concepts land and stick in your everyday leadership.
🦁
Kristen Brown's Frameworks
Built directly from Kristen's executive coaching practice and in-person Women in Leadership retreats — you are getting the same methodology her private clients pay thousands for.

Your Coach
Kristen Brown
Executive & Leadership Coach · Founder, Valeo Coaching

Kristen is an executive and leadership coach with a knack for getting people unstuck. A self-described human development nerd, she spent over a decade as a Senior Leader in global organisations — managing large teams, overseeing significant budgets, and leading through complex change — before realising what truly lit her up: helping leaders become the absolute best they can be.

Her coaching practice is grounded in Applied Coaching Psychology and spans four domains — Business and Economic Science, Psychology, Sociology, and Philosophy. She holds a Graduate Certificate in Applied Coaching from the Australian College of Applied Professions, Master's degrees in both Business Administration and Leadership and Management, and is a proud member of the International Coaching Federation.

Presence & Purpose was born from a simple belief — that world-class coaching and frameworks should not be reserved for those with a corporate budget behind them. Every ambitious woman deserves access to the tools, language and support that helps her lead on her own terms. This program delivers exactly that.

MBA · Master of Leadership & Management
Grad. Cert. Applied Coaching (ACAP)
ICF Member
10+ Years Senior Leadership
TEDx Kinjarling Licensee
Based in Australia

Questions

Everything you need to know

Who is this program designed for?
Presence & Purpose is built specifically for mid-career millennial women who are ready to step fully into their leadership potential — whether you are a manager, senior individual contributor, or aspiring to your next level.
How much time do I need each week?
Each module is designed to be completed over 4–6 weeks. Most members spend around 30–60 minutes per week — though you go entirely at your own pace. There are no deadlines, no live sessions to attend.
What is the coaching bot and how does it work?
The coaching bot is an AI-powered thinking partner built on the evidence-based GROW coaching model. You can use it any time — day or night — to work through goals, obstacles, decisions or challenges in your leadership.
Is this a replacement for 1:1 coaching?
It is not designed to replace deep 1:1 work — but it brings many of the same frameworks, reflections and guided conversations to you at a fraction of the investment. Think of it as expert-level coaching made accessible.
What if I need the VIA or 16Personalities accounts?
Both assessments are free and you create your own accounts directly on their websites. The platform guides you through the process and gives you space to record and reflect on your results.
What happens after 12 months?
Your subscription renews annually at the same rate. At the end of Month 12, your Capstone module helps you reflect on the full year and set your leadership intentions for year two — so renewal feels like a natural next step.
Is there a refund policy?
Yes — we offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If the program is not right for you within the first 30 days, contact us for a full refund. No questions asked.
Can my organisation purchase this for their team?
Yes! We offer team and corporate pricing for organisations wanting to invest in their emerging women leaders. Contact Valeo Coaching directly to discuss options.
Executive · Business · Leadership
Privacy Policy Terms of Use Contact valeocaoching.com.au

--g5: #8C652B; --g8: #D2BC85; --g9: #EEE0A9; --g11: #CFA96C; --g12: #CAA063; --g15: #90673F; --black: #000000; --navy: #0C1018; --cream: #FAF6EE; --cream-mid: #EFE6D0; --text: #2A2A2A; --text-mid: #5A5A5A; --text-light: #8A8A8A; --radius: 12px; --radius-sm: 7px; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--text); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.7; overflow-x: hidden; } /* ── UTILITIES ── */ .gold-text { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g3), var(--g2)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .gold-text-warm { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g3), var(--g1)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .container { max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; } .container-sm { max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; } .section { padding: 88px 0; } .section-sm { padding: 56px 0; } .section-eyebrow { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g4); margin-bottom: 14px; display: block; } .section-title { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; } .divider { width: 60px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); margin: 20px auto; border-radius: 2px; } .divider-left { margin: 20px 0; } /* ── NAV ── */ nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.94); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.12); padding: 0 32px; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .nav-logo { height: 64px; width: auto; } .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .nav-link { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .nav-link:hover { color: var(--g1); } .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 12px 26px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.18s; text-decoration: none; } .btn-gold { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); color: var(--black); } .btn-gold:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(135,95,37,0.35); } .btn-gold-lg { padding: 16px 40px; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); color: var(--black); } .btn-gold-lg:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(135,95,37,0.4); } .btn-outline-light { background: transparent; color: var(--g9); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.4); padding: 12px 26px; } .btn-outline-light:hover { border-color: var(--g11); color: var(--g1); background: rgba(201,160,99,0.07); } .btn-outline-dark { background: transparent; color: var(--g2); border: 1.5px solid var(--g11); padding: 14px 32px; font-size: 11.5px; } .btn-outline-dark:hover { background: var(--g2); color: var(--black); } /* ── HERO ── */ .hero { background: var(--black); min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding-top: 64px; } .hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -120px; right: -120px; width: 600px; height: 600px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(135,95,37,0.22) 0%, transparent 65%); pointer-events: none; } .hero::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -80px; left: -80px; width: 400px; height: 400px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(135,95,37,0.10) 0%, transparent 65%); pointer-events: none; } .hero-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center; max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 32px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .hero-eyebrow { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g4); margin-bottom: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 28px; height: 1px; background: var(--g11); } .hero-title { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: clamp(28px, 3.8vw, 46px); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 22px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, var(--g1) 50%, var(--g3) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .hero-sub { font-size: 17px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 32px; font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; } .hero-price-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 28px; } .hero-price { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g3)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1; } .hero-price-sub { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--g11); text-transform: uppercase; } .hero-cta-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 28px; } .hero-trust { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-size: 12.5px; font-style: italic; } .hero-trust-dot { width: 3px; height: 3px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } /* Hero right panel */ .hero-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.18); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 32px 28px; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .hero-card-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g4); margin-bottom: 20px; } .hero-card-item { display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.1); } .hero-card-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; padding-bottom: 0; } .hero-card-item:first-of-type { padding-top: 0; } .hci-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; } .hci-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); margin-bottom: 3px; } .hci-sub { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-style: italic; } /* ── PAIN SECTION ── */ .pain { background: #fff; padding: 80px 0; } .pain-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2px; margin-top: 48px; border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; } .pain-card { background: var(--cream); padding: 28px 24px; transition: background 0.2s; } .pain-card:hover { background: #f0e8d5; } .pain-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .pain-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.4; } .pain-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.65; font-style: italic; } /* ── PROGRAM SECTION ── */ .program { background: var(--cream); } .module-timeline { position: relative; margin-top: 48px; } .module-timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 26px; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--g2), var(--g1), transparent); } .mt-item { display: flex; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; position: relative; } .mt-dot { width: 53px; height: 53px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--black); flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--cream), 0 0 0 6px rgba(135,95,37,0.2); } .mt-dot.muted { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(135,95,37,0.3), rgba(237,223,167,0.3)); color: rgba(135,95,37,0.7); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--cream); } .mt-content { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--cream-mid); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 18px 22px; flex: 1; transition: all 0.2s; cursor: default; } .mt-content:hover { border-color: rgba(207,169,108,0.5); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(135,95,37,0.08); } .mt-months { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g5); margin-bottom: 4px; } .mt-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 4px; } .mt-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--text-mid); font-style: italic; line-height: 1.6; } .mt-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin-top: 8px; } .mt-tag { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--cream); color: var(--g5); border: 1px solid var(--cream-mid); } /* ── FEATURES ── */ .features { background: var(--black); } .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-top: 48px; } .feat-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.14); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; transition: all 0.2s; } .feat-card:hover { background: rgba(201,160,99,0.07); border-color: rgba(201,160,99,0.28); } .feat-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .feat-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--g1); margin-bottom: 8px; } .feat-desc { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); line-height: 1.75; font-style: italic; } /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */ .testimonials { background: #fff; } .testi-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px; margin-top: 48px; } .testi-card { background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid var(--cream-mid); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px; position: relative; } .testi-card::before { content: '"'; font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 56px; color: var(--g11); opacity: 0.3; position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 18px; line-height: 1; } .testi-quote { font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.75; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 18px; padding-top: 24px; } .testi-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .testi-avatar { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 12px; color: var(--black); flex-shrink: 0; } .testi-name { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 1px; } .testi-role { font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-light); font-style: italic; } .testi-stars { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--g11); margin-bottom: 10px; } /* ── ABOUT ── */ .about { background: var(--black); } .about-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center; } .about-photo-wrap { aspect-ratio: 3/4; border-radius: var(--radius); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .about-photo-placeholder { text-align: center; padding: 32px; } .about-photo-placeholder-icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .about-photo-placeholder-text { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g5); } .about-name { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g3)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .about-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g11); margin-bottom: 20px; } .about-body { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); line-height: 1.8; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 16px; } .about-credentials { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 20px; } .cred-chip { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 5px 13px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(201,160,99,0.12); color: var(--g11); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.2); } /* ── PRICING ── */ .pricing { background: var(--cream); } .pricing-card { background: var(--black); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.2); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 48px; max-width: 640px; margin: 48px auto 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .pricing-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g2), var(--g1), var(--g2)); } .pricing-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -100px; right: -100px; width: 300px; height: 300px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(135,95,37,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; } .pricing-badge { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); color: var(--black); padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .pricing-name { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g3)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .pricing-amount { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; margin: 20px 0; } .price-currency { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 18px; color: var(--g11); } .price-number { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: 56px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g3)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .price-period { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.09em; color: var(--g11); text-transform: uppercase; } .price-gst { font-size: 11.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 24px; } .price-includes { margin-bottom: 28px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.12); padding-top: 22px; } .pi-label { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g11); margin-bottom: 14px; } .pi-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 13.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); } .pi-check { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g2), var(--g1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 9px; color: var(--black); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .price-guarantee { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(201,160,99,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.15); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-style: italic; } /* ── WAITLIST ── */ .waitlist { background: var(--black); } .waitlist-inner { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.18); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 56px 48px; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .waitlist-inner::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -100px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 400px; height: 400px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(135,95,37,0.18) 0%, transparent 65%); pointer-events: none; } .waitlist-title { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif; font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 32px); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 14px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, var(--g1) 60%, var(--g3) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; position: relative; } .waitlist-sub { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 36px; max-width: 480px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; line-height: 1.7; } .waitlist-form { display: flex; gap: 10px; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 14px; } .wf-input { flex: 1; border: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.25); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 13px 16px; font-size: 13.5px; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .wf-input:focus { border-color: var(--g11); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .wf-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-style: italic; } .waitlist-note { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-style: italic; } /* ── FAQ ── */ .faq { background: var(--cream); } .faq-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-top: 48px; } .faq-item { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--cream-mid); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 22px 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .faq-item:hover { border-color: rgba(207,169,108,0.5); box-shadow: 0 3px 16px rgba(135,95,37,0.07); } .faq-q { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.4; } .faq-a { font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.75; font-style: italic; } /* ── FOOTER ── */ footer { background: var(--black); border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,160,99,0.1); padding: 40px 32px; text-align: center; } .footer-logo { height: 32px; width: auto; margin: 0 auto 16px; display: block; } .footer-tagline { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--g11); margin-bottom: 20px; } .footer-links { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .footer-link { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .footer-link:hover { color: var(--g11); } .footer-copy { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-style: italic; } /* Animations */ @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } .fade-up { animation: fadeUp 0.65s ease forwards; } .fade-up-2 { animation: fadeUp 0.65s ease 0.15s forwards; opacity: 0; } .fade-up-3 { animation: fadeUp 0.65s ease 0.3s forwards; opacity: 0; } .fade-up-4 { animation: fadeUp 0.65s ease 0.45s forwards; opacity: 0; } /* Responsive */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; padding: 60px 20px; } .pain-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2px; } .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .testi-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .faq-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .about-photo-wrap { display: none; } .waitlist-form { flex-direction: column; } .hero-cta-row { flex-direction: column; } }

This is for you if

You are not waiting
for permission to lead.

🪞
You downplay your achievements
Someone praises your work and you immediately redirect the credit, or say "it was nothing really." You know it is happening — you just can't seem to stop it.
🔒
You feel stuck at the same level
You have the experience and the drive, but the next opportunity keeps going to someone else. You are not sure whether it is your presence, your strategy, or something else entirely.
🌀
Imposter syndrome is loud
Even when things are going well, there is a persistent voice asking "what if they find out I don't really know what I'm doing?" You are exhausted from carrying it alone.
💸
1:1 coaching is out of reach
You know coaching would help. But a full 3-month program costs thousands of dollars — money you cannot justify right now. You need expert guidance at a price that makes sense.
⏱
You have no time to waste
You are balancing a full career, relationships and life. You need development that works around your schedule — not another commitment that burns you out before you begin.
🧭
You have lost your sense of direction
Somewhere between the demands of the job and the expectations of others, you have lost touch with what you actually want — and what kind of leader you are meant to become.
The Program

A full year of structured growth, built around your life.

Presence & Purpose is structured as 8 progressive modules across 12 months — each one building on the last, each unlocking at the right moment in your growth. You move at your own pace, on your own schedule, supported by a coaching bot available any time you need a thinking partner.

This is not passive content consumption. It is active, guided development — with deep reflection, coaching conversations and knowledge checks designed to help you apply every insight to your real leadership, right now.

8 Self-Paced Modules

Start your journey with the VIA Character Strengths Survey and the 16Personalities test — two world-class tools that give you a rich self-awareness foundation from day one.
✍️
Guided Reflection Exercises
Every module includes deep written reflection prompts — saved to your profile and woven throughout your experience — so your insights build on each other across the full year.
✅
Knowledge Checks
Reinforce your learning with reflective assessments at the end of each module — designed not to test you, but to help the concepts land and stick in your everyday leadership.
🦁
Kristen Brown's Frameworks
Built directly from Kristen's executive coaching practice and in-person Women in Leadership retreats — you are getting the same methodology her private clients pay thousands for.

Your Coach
Kristen Brown
Executive & Leadership Coach · Founder, Valeo Coaching

Kristen is an executive and leadership coach with a knack for getting people unstuck. A self-described human development nerd, she spent over a decade as a Senior Leader in global organisations — managing large teams, overseeing significant budgets, and leading through complex change — before realising what truly lit her up: helping leaders become the absolute best they can be.

Her coaching practice is grounded in Applied Coaching Psychology and spans four domains — Business and Economic Science, Psychology, Sociology, and Philosophy. She holds a Graduate Certificate in Applied Coaching from the Australian College of Applied Professions, Master's degrees in both Business Administration and Leadership and Management, and is a proud member of the International Coaching Federation.

Presence & Purpose was born from a simple belief — that world-class coaching and frameworks should not be reserved for those with a corporate budget behind them. Every ambitious woman deserves access to the tools, language and support that helps her lead on her own terms. This program delivers exactly that.

MBA · Master of Leadership & Management
Grad. Cert. Applied Coaching (ACAP)
ICF Member
10+ Years Senior Leadership

Questions

Everything you need to know

Who is this program designed for?
Presence & Purpose is built specifically for mid-career millennial women who are ready to step fully into their leadership potential — whether you are a manager, senior individual contributor, or aspiring to your next level.
How much time do I need each week?
Each module is designed to be completed over 4–6 weeks. Most members spend around 30–60 minutes per week — though you go entirely at your own pace. There are no deadlines, no live sessions to attend.
What is the coaching bot and how does it work?
The coaching bot is an AI-powered thinking partner built on the evidence-based GROW coaching model. You can use it any time — day or night — to work through goals, obstacles, decisions or challenges in your leadership.
Is this a replacement for 1:1 coaching?
It is not designed to replace deep 1:1 work — but it brings many of the same frameworks, reflections and guided conversations to you at a fraction of the investment. Think of it as expert-level coaching made accessible.
What if I need the VIA or 16Personalities accounts?
Both assessments are free and you create your own accounts directly on their websites. The platform guides you through the process and gives you space to record and reflect on your results.
What happens after 12 months?
Your subscription renews annually at the same rate. At the end of Month 12, your Capstone module helps you reflect on the full year and set your leadership intentions for year two — so renewal feels like a natural next step.
Is there a refund policy?
Yes — we offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If the program is not right for you within the first 30 days, contact us for a full refund. No questions asked.
Can my organisation purchase this for their team?
Yes! We offer team and corporate pricing for organisations wanting to invest in their emerging women leaders. Contact Valeo Coaching directly to discuss options.
